questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Civilmart and/or Taylex.

Are Civilmart and Taylex close competitors in the supply of any products/services? If so, for which products/services? Additionally, are they both purchasers of any of the same types of inputs? If so, which ones?
Describe whether AWTS, septic tanks, and/or rainwater tanks are effective substitutes for each other.
Describe how product material impacts a customer’s choice of AWTS, septic tanks and rainwater tanks – including whether polymer AWTS are a close substitute for concrete AWTS.
Identify alternative suppliers of AWTS, septic tanks and rainwater tanks, and describe how their AWTS, septic tank, and/or rainwater tank product(s) compare with Civilmart and Taylex’s products.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
